description: Coverage-aware manager/fund overlap comparing a subject plan against peers for one period.
sql: WITH period_rows AS (SELECT plan_id, plan_period, manager_name, fund_name, exposure_usd, disclosure_state FROM manager_fund_positions WHERE plan_period = :plan_period), subject_rows AS (SELECT manager_name, fund_name, exposure_usd, disclosure_state FROM period_rows WHERE plan_id = :subject_plan_id), counterparty_plans AS (SELECT DISTINCT plan_id AS counterparty_plan_id FROM period_rows WHERE plan_id <> :subject_plan_id), position_keys AS (SELECT cp.counterparty_plan_id, sr.manager_name, sr.fund_name FROM counterparty_plans AS cp CROSS JOIN subject_rows AS sr UNION SELECT pr.plan_id AS counterparty_plan_id, pr.manager_name, pr.fund_name FROM period_rows AS pr WHERE pr.plan_id <> :subject_plan_id), joined AS (SELECT pk.counterparty_plan_id, pk.manager_name, pk.fund_name, sr.exposure_usd AS subject_exposure_usd, cp.exposure_usd AS counterparty_exposure_usd, COALESCE(sr.disclosure_state, 'not_disclosed') AS subject_disclosure_state, COALESCE(cp.disclosure_state, 'not_disclosed') AS counterparty_disclosure_state FROM position_keys AS pk LEFT JOIN subject_rows AS sr ON sr.manager_name = pk.manager_name AND sr.fund_name = pk.fund_name LEFT JOIN period_rows AS cp ON cp.plan_id = pk.counterparty_plan_id AND cp.manager_name = pk.manager_name AND cp.fund_name = pk.fund_name) SELECT :subject_plan_id AS subject_plan_id, counterparty_plan_id, :plan_period AS plan_period, manager_name, fund_name, CASE WHEN subject_disclosure_state = 'disclosed' AND counterparty_disclosure_state = 'disclosed' AND subject_exposure_usd IS NOT NULL AND counterparty_exposure_usd IS NOT NULL THEN 'overlap' WHEN subject_disclosure_state = 'disclosed' AND counterparty_disclosure_state = 'disclosed' THEN 'unknown_due_to_non_disclosure' WHEN subject_disclosure_state != 'not_disclosed' AND counterparty_disclosure_state != 'not_disclosed' AND (subject_disclosure_state = 'known_not_invested' OR counterparty_disclosure_state = 'known_not_invested') THEN 'known_not_invested' ELSE 'unknown_due_to_non_disclosure' END AS overlap_status, CASE WHEN subject_disclosure_state = 'disclosed' AND counterparty_disclosure_state = 'disclosed' AND subject_exposure_usd IS NOT NULL AND counterparty_exposure_usd IS NOT NULL THEN MIN(subject_exposure_usd, counterparty_exposure_usd) ELSE NULL END AS overlap_usd, subject_disclosure_state, counterparty_disclosure_state FROM joined ORDER BY counterparty_plan_id, manager_name, fund_name;
assumptions: disclosure_state is one of disclosed, not_disclosed, known_not_invested
known_not_invested means explicit zero and is distinct from not_disclosed unknowns
